meta.current_constraint_note: Initial value per ToC flow redesign (Move 6). See Reference/Patterns/2026-04-11-toc-flow-discipline.md.
meta.constraint_rationale: Structural analysis: flat backlog (no single task blocks 3+). Human-bandwidth axis: decision gates are the binding limit. Throughput test: unlimited review time would increase completions. Validated per constraint-identification pattern §3.

project_goal.statement: Maximize validated dev throughput per unit of Shane's decision-bandwidth.

module_goals.goal: Maintain a constraint-aligned backlog where the top item is always the highest-leverage next action.
Ensure every plan-mode entry has prior-art hits from indexed Reference and Documentation.
Propagate every design decision to Reference/ in the same session it is made.
Minimize constraint-time per session by batching gates and pre-staging context.

tasks.title: Draft post-implementation ToC retrospective doc validating predictions in concept-toc-flow-analysis.md §5.1
tasks.description: After Now-tier moves land AND Move 5 produces 10+ completion records, draft Documentation/md/concept-toc-flow-results.md comparing predicted vs measured.

tasks.title: Move 10 — Enforce Roadmap horizon field and Now-item promote-or-archive flag
tasks.description: Update cps-capture Roadmap template to require horizon field; flag Now items >14 days for promote-or-archive on next REPRIORITIZE.

tasks.title: Move 7 — Add buffer-penetration flag for first-of-kind tasks in RECOMMEND
tasks.description: Update RECOMMEND to mark tasks with zero cps-query hits as first-of-kind; budget extra plan time per CCPM buffer management.
